sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33988" key="e)/mbh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμβη</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμβητον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβήῃ</orth>, <sense id="n33988.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐμβαίνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
